Operation 'createBoxWebhook' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is too vague about what 'box notifications' means and lacks critical details. Improved version clarifies: (1) what box webhooks do (receive notifications for box events), (2) authentication requirement, (3) expected inputs (URL, event types), (4) what is returned (webhook object with ID), (5) side effect (webhook becomes active immediately). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: Create a new webhook for box notifications.
data.summary_suggestion: Create a new box webhook for notifications
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new webhook to receive notifications for box events. Requires authentication and valid webhook configuration (URL, event types). Returns the created webhook object with its ID and configuration. The webhook will begin receiving notifications immediately upon successful creation.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague about what 'box notifications' means and lacks critical details. Improved version clarifies: (1) what box webhooks do (receive notifications for box events), (2) authentication requirement, (3) expected inputs (URL, event types), (4) what is returned (webhook object with ID), (5) side effect (webhook becomes active immediately). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'getBoxWebhooks' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description lacks specificity about what data is returned and scope. Improved version clarifies: (1) what is retrieved (all webhooks for the enterprise), (2) authentication requirement, (3) what fields are included in response (IDs, URLs, event types, configuration), (4) scope limitation (enterprise-specific). This helps AI agents understand the operation's scope and what data they'll receive.

data.current_description: Get box webhooks for the enterprise.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all box webhooks for enterprise
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all webhooks configured for the authenticated enterprise. Returns a list of webhook objects containing their IDs, URLs, event types, and configuration details. Requires authentication. Results are scoped to the authenticated user's enterprise only.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about what data is returned and scope. Improved version clarifies: (1) what is retrieved (all webhooks for the enterprise), (2) authentication requirement, (3) what fields are included in response (IDs, URLs, event types, configuration), (4) scope limitation (enterprise-specific). This helps AI agents understand the operation's scope and what data they'll receive.

message: Operation 'deleteBoxWebhook' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_side_effects, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is minimal and lacks important context. Improved version clarifies: (1) what happens when deleted (webhook stops receiving notifications), (2) authentication requirement, (3) authorization scope (webhook must belong to user's enterprise), (4) what is returned (success confirmation), (5) side effects (immediate cessation of notifications). This helps AI agents understand authorization constraints and the operation's effects.

data.current_description: Delete a box webhook by ID.
data.summary_suggestion: Delete a box webhook by ID
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a specific webhook by its ID, preventing it from receiving further notifications. Requires authentication and the webhook must belong to the authenticated user's enterprise. Returns a success confirmation. The webhook will immediately stop receiving notifications upon deletion.
data.reasoning: Original description is minimal and lacks important context. Improved version clarifies: (1) what happens when deleted (webhook stops receiving notifications), (2) authentication requirement, (3) authorization scope (webhook must belong to user's enterprise), (4) what is returned (success confirmation), (5) side effects (immediate cessation of notifications). This helps AI agents understand authorization constraints and the operation's effects.

Added clarity about entity types, return value details, and authentication requirement for better AI agent interpretability.

data.reasoning: Description is vague about what 'entity' means and what information is returned. Added clarity about entity types, return value details, and authentication requirement for better AI agent interpretability.
